title: BA14 9AX, Wessex Water Services Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/BB3934AG/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Wessex Water Services Limited Installation name: Trowbridge Bioresources Centre Permit number: EPR/BB3934AG/V002  "
